# Imperfection budget (auto-generated, mean ± SEM over MC seeds)

Ideal heralded purity of the base source (10 mm, 0.164 THz pump): **0.8100**

| Imperfection | unit | 1% budget | 5% budget | 10% budget |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Center jitter rms (20 mm) | GHz | 13.5 ± 0.2 | 31.3 ± 0.4 | 45.3 ± 0.6 |
| Center jitter rms (10 mm) | GHz | 27.7 ± 0.3 | 62.7 ± 0.7 | 91 ± 1 |
| Center jitter rms (5 mm) | GHz | 54.1 ± 0.9 | 125 ± 1 | 181 ± 3 |
| Center jitter rms (10 mm, Gaussian PM) | GHz | 30 ± 0.3 | 68.5 ± 0.8 | 102 ± 1 |
| Mode spacing, 3-mode comb | GHz | 29.6 ± 0.1 | 75.9 ± 0.5 | 112.1 ± 0.7 |
| Additional side modes @ 0.25 THz | count | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| Pump bandwidth window (ideal) | THz | 0.159–0.202 | 0.131–0.244 | 0.114–0.281 |
| RIN (budget on pair boost) | % rms | 9.93 ± 0.08 | 22.3 ± 0.2 | beyond sweep |

Cells: largest imperfection keeping P within the stated relative
drop of ideal, mean ± SEM over the per-seed threshold crossings.
Deterministic rows (bandwidth) carry no MC error. RIN is budgeted
on <w²>/<w>² (purity is exactly RIN-invariant).
